a8ee3e47-6144-4e75-8870-1ec8c132f9f8.name: NDRI
a8ee3e47-6144-4e75-8870-1ec8c132f9f8.address: Three Parkway 1601 Cherry Street, Suite 1700 Philadelphia, PA 19102 USA
a8ee3e47-6144-4e75-8870-1ec8c132f9f8.description: We provide human biospecimens worldwide to advance biomedical/bioscience research & development.

2ae3534e-ae64-4956-8c42-2f64b720ff33.name: BIOMEDICA CRO
2ae3534e-ae64-4956-8c42-2f64b720ff33.description: We do biosample procurement through a broad network of partnered hospitals in Ukraine and supply them globally. Human biospecimen collection is an easy task with us.

24896abd-fc2c-4310-a02e-d5fbd211562e.name: France Tissue Bank
24896abd-fc2c-4310-a02e-d5fbd211562e.description:
France Tissue Bank – Your trusted partner for high-quality, responsive biospecimen sourcing

Looking for high-standard, reliable samples with fast turnaround times? France Tissue Bank (FTB) is your ideal partner.

🔹 Specialized in oncology and working closely with Anatomo-Cyto-Pathology laboratories, FTB provides premium human biospecimens including FFPE blocks, histological slides, liquid-based PAP smears, and digital pathology images.

We support cutting-edge companies operating in 
✔️ Artificial Intelligence, 
✔️ Digital Health, 
✔️ MedTech, 
✔️ Molecular and In Vitro Diagnostics, 
✔️ Drug Development, 
✔️ Biotechnology, 
✔️ Precision Medicine
✔️ Translational Research 
✔️ CRO

Our services include:
🔷Supply of biospecimens (FFPE blocks, slide sets, smears, digital images)
🔷Medical and pathological expertise
🔷Special staining and molecular biology testing
🔷Cession of multimodal datasets (images, annotations, clinical and molecular data)
🔷Customized services to support new therapeutic or technological developments

🎯 Our mission: to accelerate cancer research and innovation by providing high-quality, ethically sourced biological materials and data within a compliant and responsive framework.

0d6ee50f-4b67-468c-8385-8687c24030dc.name: Medical Gate
0d6ee50f-4b67-468c-8385-8687c24030dc.description: MEDICAL GATE has a staff specialized in every stage of clinical research.

fe7fb818-c267-4388-8e7c-3f5fd6f8edc2.name: CSD Bio
fe7fb818-c267-4388-8e7c-3f5fd6f8edc2.description: CSD BIO is Ukrainian Biobank prone to empower researchers with the tools for advancing precision medicine​. Our biorepository offers an extensive inventory of biospecimens as well as an exclusive laboratory and research services.

398b75e3-c0ae-491d-8f5d-84a4b226d19f.name: The Windber Biobank
398b75e3-c0ae-491d-8f5d-84a4b226d19f.description: The Windber Biobank, part of the Chan Soon-Shiong Institute of Molecular Medicine at Windber (formerly Windber Research Institute), is a CAP-accredited and CLIA-certified facility established in 2001 to support translational cancer research. It houses hundreds of thousands of high-quality, well-annotated human biospecimens—including blood, plasma, and solid tissues—and provides advanced processing, storage, and data-tracking services. The biobank supports major Department of Defense and NIH programs, serving as a centralized resource for precision medicine and proteogenomic studies.

f5eaef2d-c061-45f0-84ff-c08e1cf6908c.name: CHTN Eastern
f5eaef2d-c061-45f0-84ff-c08e1cf6908c.description: Serving the Research Community with Quality Biospecimens for more than 30 years!

235e6ec4-ad5e-4ed8-9fa9-3f566c045ff8.name: JLR Life Sciences
235e6ec4-ad5e-4ed8-9fa9-3f566c045ff8.description: High-quality biospecimens. Precision lab services. One trusted partner.

9e6ec4c7-b5b4-4f16-a009-eb268f9edf66.name: Stibion
9e6ec4c7-b5b4-4f16-a009-eb268f9edf66.description: Stichting Biobank Oost Nederland (Stibion), based in the Netherlands, manages and distributes urine and plasma samples from an active cohort of individuals aged 45 and older. The study collects urine and health data every 4 months, and blood samples once a year, offering a rich resource for population health and biomarker research.

39576032-ee6b-40ae-b2b7-6bb368281575.name: ProteoGenex
39576032-ee6b-40ae-b2b7-6bb368281575.address: 460 Hindry Ave, Unit A, Inglewood CA, 90301 USA
39576032-ee6b-40ae-b2b7-6bb368281575.description: ProteoGenex is an established innovative provider of human biological specimens and clinical information of the highest quality.

8ef694f1-fe09-4635-8e2c-87b9dc9b16b8.name: Ino Specimen Biobank
8ef694f1-fe09-4635-8e2c-87b9dc9b16b8.description: INOVIE Group, major French network of clinical laboratories gives you access to characterized patients specimens. Its dedicated company, INO Specimens Biobank, ISB, interfaces contacts with 700 clinical labs, 27 Central Laboratories, all together testing 90 000 patients files per day, on a test menu with more than 600 different markers (+120 autoimmune markers, +400 allergens for specific IgE quantification). More than 20 000 specimens are immediately available.

ec995525-c4f6-4321-80fa-2fa586e0f1c7.name: Shlok Superspecialty Care
ec995525-c4f6-4321-80fa-2fa586e0f1c7.description: In collaboration with various institutions, hospitals, and collection centers, we recruit patients specifically for participation in clinical research and biospecimen studies.

a3a6f6b3-2fc5-438a-bb5c-5826c2f85d1f.name: Precision Ocular Network
a3a6f6b3-2fc5-438a-bb5c-5826c2f85d1f.description: The Precision Ocular Biobank, a division of Precision Ocular Network, is one of the world’s only certified Ocular Biobanks. Featuring human post-mortem, normal and diseased fixed and frozen whole eyes, aqueous, vitreous, cells and blood. Diseases include AMD, Glaucoma, Diabetic Retinopathy and more.

8c6af273-0fa7-4f0d-9bc8-aa4cb15f8d79.name: Ukraine Research Group
8c6af273-0fa7-4f0d-9bc8-aa4cb15f8d79.description: The mission of the Ukraine Research Group is to promote the development of advanced technologies for precision biomedical research. We focus on the development of biobanks and the use of high-quality biospecimens for medical research.

f32ecfc7-ebfb-4871-81c3-3888c9137b57.name: MyAfroDNA
f32ecfc7-ebfb-4871-81c3-3888c9137b57.address: 1 East Erie St Suite 525-5453 Chicago, IL 60611 USA

181a7fdd-77fe-4f45-8c7f-822a9a27b612.name: Anagram Research Solutions
181a7fdd-77fe-4f45-8c7f-822a9a27b612.description: Anagram Research Solutions is a biobank and research organization that provides high-quality biospecimens for medical research.

1425f7cb-6096-490e-858f-480b82197688.name: The Neuro C-BIG Repository
1425f7cb-6096-490e-858f-480b82197688.address: 3801 University Street Montreal, QC H3A 2B4 Canada
1425f7cb-6096-490e-858f-480b82197688.description: A growing collection of biospecimens, longitudinal clinical and neuropsychiatric information, imaging and genetic data from patients with neurological disease as well as healthy controls.
